title: Vishal Mega Mart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vishal Mega Mart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!
